rationale: Reconfirmed under the decision-inertness lens. The only delta since my round-1 APPROVE is the additive TestPanel_GateFieldDecisionInertAllEnumValues; `git diff d327cdce 18b2624a -- cmd/mindspec/panel.go internal/panel/create.go` is empty (prod byte-identical). The new test pins PanelGateDecision.Action+Message AND ApproveThreshold() identical across all 5 real gate keys (spec_approve/plan_approve/bead/final_review/adhoc) plus "", over both an Allow and a stale-SHA Block scenario on otherwise-identical panels — genuinely closing F1's gap that 112 only looped {"",bead,weird}. Decision body reads no .Gate (grep clean; only create.go writer + advisory readers touch Gate). 112 pin unmodified at line 304. internal/panel imports no internal/config (leaf intact; literals mirror the enum by design). `go test ./internal/panel ./cmd/mindspec` green.
findings: Prod code byte-identical: git diff d327cdce..18b2624a for panel.go/create.go is empty; sole change is +85 lines in panel_test.go.
New test correctly asserts PanelGateDecision (Action+Message) and ApproveThreshold() are invariant across all 5 PanelGateKeys + empty string, in both Allow and Block scenarios.
Decision path (gate.go PanelGateDecision, lines 131-340) reads no .Gate; only create.go:139 (writer) and advisory helpers reference Gate.
112 pin TestPanel_GateFieldDecisionInert retained (line 304); config-free leaf preserved (no internal/config import in internal/panel).
